text.message: Guys I hope that you see that I cannot hold the road
And OJ is about to get it to reach 7
And you are all solo blocking me
But you are all helping OJ to beat us all
Now now black. You’re winning . Don’t be modest
Mate you have the undisputable LA
And in case you also have the road, then it is over for sure
My settles are all on 1 points
I have the lowest income most probably
You gave the game to OJ
wasting our time with that speech
Now remember who solo blocked you black beginning of game. Make sure to take revenge on that person for what they did
No man I always play logical
Emotion is better. Revenge 😈 is more important than logic in catan . To teach them a lesson
Why would you give the road to OJ ?
i am sacrfiicing points to extend here
You guys need to give all your cards to red
Can only exchange with the port and then give
eveybody is winning but you mate
🤫 don’t tell them about your VP red
how do you play 4000 games and still plat 1
Because I’m trans lesb 🦎 reptile hermaphrodite
I do not get why blue still steal from me
